TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Abyssal Legions Faction.

Translations.Comment: Legiones = legions. Organized demonic armies, mixed with corrupted mortals. Abisales emphasizes the dark, corrupting nature of the abyss.
Nórdicos = Northmen/Nordic warriors. Maintains barbarian warrior identity while showing corruption through unit type classification.
Guerreros = warriors. Core infantry unit expressing the demonic corruption through faction classification.
Cría = spawn/offspring. Conveys bestial corruption and dragon heritage with mythological weight.
Jinetes = riders/cavalry. Emphasizes mounted warriors from the northern tribes.
Corrupted knights serving the abyss. Heavy demonic cavalry.
Sabuesos = war hounds/hunting dogs. Evokes ferocious, demonic beasts serving the abyss. More martial than perros.
Carro = chariot/war cart. Simple and direct, emphasizing the demonic war machine's brutality and speed.
Archidemonio = Archdevil/Greater demon. Maintains consistency with Abyssal Demons faction. Conveys supreme demonic authority.
Demoniocría = Devilspawn/Demon offspring. Maintains consistency with Abyssal Demons faction. Emphasizes infernal breeding and corruption.
Mamut de Guerra = War Mammoth. Direct translation that emphasizes the massive, unstoppable nature of the corrupted beast.
Dragón Abisal = Abyssal Dragon. Premier aerial threat of the faction. Conveys terrifying power and ancient corruption.
Mantícora = Manticore. Standard Spanish term for the mythological beast. Maintains the creature's fearsome, ancient nature.
Campeón Abisal = Abyssal Champion. Elite hero unit embodying abyssal might. Conveys singular power and demonic mastery.
Hechicero Abisal = Abyssal Sorcerer. Dark spellcaster serving the abyss. Conveys arcane corruption and malevolent intent.
Líder de Manada = Pack leader/Warlord. Emphasizes the brutal, animalistic leadership of corrupted northern warriors. Alpha predator figure.
